message:
feat: add compatibility mode to module resolver requests and expand resolver test coverage

Module resolver (module_resolver.rs, +117 lines):
- Add compatibility_mode field to ModuleRequest, backed by
  CompatibilityMode from module_compatibility_matrix
- Default to CompatibilityMode::Native with serde skip_serializing_if
  for backward-compatible serialization (existing consumers see no change)
- Add with_compatibility_mode() builder method on ModuleRequest
- Add default_compatibility_mode() and is_native_compatibility_mode()
  helpers for serde default/skip logic
- Extend resolution logic to thread compatibility mode through the
  resolve pipeline for mode-aware module loading

Tests:
- module_resolver.rs: +47 lines of unit tests for compatibility mode
  propagation, builder methods, and serde round-trip behavior
- module_resolver_integration.rs: +29 lines testing cross-module
  resolution with non-default compatibility modes

Also updates franken_shipped_path_parity.rs with minor refinements
to path parity contract verification logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
